name: Hot Beef Party Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Chablis or dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter in a 1-quart casserole dish and microwave on high until melted.
2. Add the onions and cover; microwave on high for 2 minutes or until tender.
3. Stir in the wine and microwave on high for 1 minute.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
5. Microwave on high for an additional 4 minutes.
6. Serve with crackers.
